'''âzh-f-z''' ('''kazhafaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unaffiliate|unaffiliate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unaffiliate|unaffiliate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-f-z
|-
! Lemma
| kazhafaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhafaz|thizhafaz]] || [[word:jizhafaz|jizhafaz]] || [[word:shizhafaz|shizhafaz]] || [[word:kizhafaz|kizhafaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhafaz|thuthuzhafaz]] || [[word:jujuzhafaz|jujuzhafaz]] || [[word:shushuzhafaz|shushuzhafaz]] || [[word:kukuzhafaz|kukuzhafaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhafaz|thuzhafaz]] || [[word:juzhafaz|juzhafaz]] || [[word:shuzhafaz|shuzhafaz]] || [[word:kuzhafaz|kuzhafaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhafaz|thuzhafaz]] || [[word:juzhafaz|juzhafaz]] || [[word:shuzhafaz|shuzhafaz]] || [[word:kuzhafaz|kuzhafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhafaz|thezhafaz]] || [[word:jezhafaz|jezhafaz]] || [[word:shezhafaz|shezhafaz]] || [[word:kezhafaz|kezhafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhafaz|thothozhafaz]] || [[word:jojozhafaz|jojozhafaz]] || [[word:shoshozhafaz|shoshozhafaz]] || [[word:kokozhafaz|kokozhafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhafaz|thozhafaz]] || [[word:jozhafaz|jozhafaz]] || [[word:shozhafaz|shozhafaz]] || [[word:kozhafaz|kozhafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhafaz|thozhafaz]] || [[word:jozhafaz|jozhafaz]] || [[word:shozhafaz|shozhafaz]] || [[word:kozhafaz|kozhafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhafaz|thĂŠzhafaz]] || [[word:jĂŠzhafaz|jĂŠzhafaz]] || [[word:shĂŠzhafaz|shĂŠzhafaz]] || [[word:kĂŠzhafaz|kĂŠzhafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhafaz|thathazhafaz]] || [[word:jajazhafaz|jajazhafaz]] || [[word:shashazhafaz|shashazhafaz]] || [[word:kakazhafaz|kakazhafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhafaz|thazhafaz]] || [[word:jazhafaz|jazhafaz]] || [[word:shazhafaz|shazhafaz]] || [[word:kazhafaz|kazhafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhafaz|thazhafaz]] || [[word:jazhafaz|jazhafaz]] || [[word:shazhafaz|shazhafaz]] || [[word:kazhafaz|kazhafaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhafaz|shazhafaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhafaz|goshazhafaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhafaz|gokishazhafaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhafaznĂŒ|shazhafaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhafaznknĂŒ|goshazhafaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhafaznĂŒ|gokishazhafaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhafazshĂ«|shazhafazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkshĂ«|goshazhafaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhafazshĂ«|gokishazhafazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhafazro|shazhafazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkro|goshazhafaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhafazro|gokishazhafazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhafazmu|shazhafazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkmu|goshazhafaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhafazmu|gokishazhafazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhafazsher|shazhafazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhafaznksher|goshazhafaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhafazsher|gokishazhafazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhafazng|shazhafazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkng|goshazhafaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhafazng|gokishazhafazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhafazya|shazhafazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkya|goshazhafaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhafazya|gokishazhafazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhafazyam|shazhafazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkyam|goshazhafaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhafazyam|gokishazhafazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhafaznĂŒshĂ«|shazhafaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhafaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhafaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhafaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhafaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhafaznĂŒro|shazhafaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhafaznknĂŒro|goshazhafaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhafaznĂŒro|gokishazhafaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhafaznĂŒmu|shazhafaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhafaznknĂŒmu|goshazhafaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhafaznĂŒmu|gokishazhafaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhafazshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhafazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhafaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhafazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhafazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhafazshĂ«ro|shazhafazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkshĂ«ro|goshazhafaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhafazshĂ«ro|gokishazhafazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhafazshĂ«mu|shazhafazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkshĂ«mu|goshazhafaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhafazshĂ«mu|gokishazhafazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhafazronĂŒ|shazhafazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkronĂŒ|goshazhafaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhafazronĂŒ|gokishazhafazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhafazroshĂ«|shazhafazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkroshĂ«|goshazhafaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhafazroshĂ«|gokishazhafazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhafazromu|shazhafazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkromu|goshazhafaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhafazromu|gokishazhafazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhafazmunĂŒ|shazhafazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkmunĂŒ|goshazhafaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhafazmunĂŒ|gokishazhafazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhafazmushĂ«|shazhafazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkmushĂ«|goshazhafaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhafazmushĂ«|gokishazhafazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhafazmuro|shazhafazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhafaznkmuro|goshazhafaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhafazmuro|gokishazhafazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
